G1.label:
α : Type u_1
inst : DecidableEq α
v x : α
xs : List α
ih : v ∈ xs → ∃ l r, xs = l ++ v :: r
h : v ∈ x :: xs
no : ¬x = v
⊢ ∃ l r, x :: xs = l ++ v :: r

G2.label:
case inl
α : Type u_1
inst : DecidableEq α
v x : α
xs : List α
ih : v ∈ xs → ∃ l r, xs = l ++ v :: r
no : ¬x = v
h_1 : v = x
⊢ ∃ l r, x :: xs = l ++ v :: r

G3.label:
case inr
α : Type u_1
inst : DecidableEq α
v x : α
xs : List α
ih : v ∈ xs → ∃ l r, xs = l ++ v :: r
no : ¬x = v
h_2 : v ∈ xs
⊢ ∃ l r, x :: xs = l ++ v :: r

G4.label:
case inr.h
α : Type u_1
inst : DecidableEq α
v x : α
no : ¬x = v
w w_1 : List α
⊢ ∃ r, x :: (w ++ v :: w_1) = ?inr.w ++ v :: r

G5.label:
case inr.h.h
α : Type u_1
inst : DecidableEq α
v x : α
no : ¬x = v
w w_1 : List α
⊢ x :: (w ++ v :: w_1) = ?inr.w ++ v :: ?inr.h.w
